scripts.frontend:build:dev: cd frontend && npm run build -- --mode development
scripts.frontend:dev:dev: cd frontend && npm run dev -- --mode development
scripts.backend:start:integrated: npm run frontend:build && npx tsx src/local.ts
scripts.backend:test:all: npm run backend:test:node && npm run backend:test:worker
scripts.tauri:resolve-sidecar-target: node -e "const raw=process.env.TAURI_BUILD_TARGET||process.env.CARGO_BUILD_TARGET||process.env.npm_config_target||''; const nodeMajor=process.versions.node.split('.')[0]; const current=process.platform==='darwin'?(process.arch==='arm64'?'aarch64-apple-darwin':'x86_64-apple-darwin'):process.platform==='win32'?(process.arch==='arm64'?'aarch64-pc-windows-msvc':'x86_64-pc-windows-msvc'):''; const target=raw||current; const map={'aarch64-apple-darwin':['macos-arm64','tauri/build/binaries/ai-gateway-backend-aarch64-apple-darwin'],'x86_64-apple-darwin':['macos-x64','tauri/build/binaries/ai-gateway-backend-x86_64-apple-darwin'],'aarch64-pc-windows-msvc':['win-arm64','tauri/build/binaries/ai-gateway-backend-aarch64-pc-windows-msvc.exe'],'x86_64-pc-windows-msvc':['win-x64','tauri/build/binaries/ai-gateway-backend-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe']}; const cfg=map[target]; if(!cfg){console.error('Unsupported Tauri sidecar target: '+target); process.exit(1);} console.log(JSON.stringify({tauriTarget:target,nodeMajor,pkgTarget:'node'+nodeMajor+'-'+cfg[0],output:cfg[1]}));"
scripts.tauri:build-sidecar-backend: npm run tauri:bundle-sidecar-js && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const npm=process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm'; const isWin=process.platform==='win32'; const targetResult=spawnSync(npm,['run','--silent','tauri:resolve-sidecar-target'],{encoding:'utf8', shell: isWin}); if(targetResult.status!==0 || targetResult.error){console.error('Failed to resolve target:', targetResult.error || targetResult.stderr || targetResult.stdout); process.exit(targetResult.status??1);} let cfg; try { cfg=JSON.parse(targetResult.stdout.trim()); } catch(e){ console.error('Failed to parse target JSON:', targetResult.stdout); process.exit(1); } console.log('Resolved target:', cfg); const npx=process.platform==='win32'?'npx.cmd':'npx'; const args=['pkg','tauri/build/dist-backend/index.js','--target',cfg.pkgTarget,'--output',cfg.output,'--config','package.json']; console.log('Running:', npx, args.join(' ')); const r=spawnSync(npx,args,{stdio:'inherit', shell: isWin}); if(r.error) { console.error('Failed to run pkg:', r.error); process.exit(1); } process.exit(r.status??1);"
